tagline: Building reliable data platforms, AI systems, and the software that ships them.
description: Data, AI, and Software Engineer with 4+ years across Deloitte, WAFU, and the University at Buffalo, and three CS degrees. I build pipelines, ML/LLM systems, and production-ready software.

roles.detailed: Data Engineer | AI / ML Engineer | Software Engineer

bio: Engineer who works across the whole stack of modern data and AI — from the SQL and pipelines underneath, to the ML and LLM systems on top, to the backend services that ship it. Three CS degrees (Diploma to B.Tech to M.S.) and 4+ years across Deloitte, WAFU, and the University at Buffalo taught me to build systems that are reliable, measurable, and production-ready. I cut a nightly pipeline from 2 hours to 35 minutes, modeled 1M+ records, and cut manual review 80%.

bullets: Built Python, SQL, Airflow, and BigQuery workflows that collect, cleanse, validate, and prepare 25+ operational and research datasets for reporting and exploratory analysis.
Defined data-collection standards and 5 recurring quality controls with faculty and SMEs — completeness, duplicates, schema drift, late files, and exception trends.
Profiled datasets with Python, R, SQL, Pandas, and NumPy to surface outliers, compare baselines, and evaluate correlations for stakeholder review.
Optimized recurring SQL jobs and partitioned BigQuery tables, cutting nightly processing from 2 hours to 35 minutes while preserving audit logs and recovery steps.
experience.desc: Built and optimized data pipelines and quality controls; cut nightly runtime 2h to 35m and modeled 1M+ records for reporting and analysis.

bullets: Analyzed TV/media datasets — audience, campaign, transaction, and reference data from 6 source systems — using Python, SQL, Spark, Databricks, and Airflow for client reporting and KPI analysis.
Built 15+ Tableau and Power BI dashboards tracking audience-segment trends, campaign KPI movement, delayed events, and data completeness.
Documented 40+ source-to-target mappings and implemented reconciliation, cleansing, and data-quality rules — cutting manual review effort by 80%.
Translated audience, campaign, and transaction trends into client-ready insight summaries across entertainment and news clients.
experience.desc: TV/media data engineering and analytics: 15+ dashboards, 6 source systems unified, 80% less manual review across enterprise client reporting.

bullets: Analyzed adtech event, campaign, customer-transaction, order, inventory, and payment-workflow data across 4 client applications using SQL, Python, and NoSQL.
Built monitoring queries covering 5 categories of operational and ad-event exceptions — event mismatches, order issues, rejected records, inventory gaps, and recurring failures.
Modeled 6+ reporting tables and optimized MySQL queries for agency reporting, campaign visibility, and operational performance monitoring.
experience.desc: Adtech data analysis and monitoring across 4 client apps: exception detection, reporting models, and MySQL optimization.

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction
projects.subtitle: ML on 500k+ records
projects.desc: Churn prediction models using Logistic Regression, XGBoost, and Random Forest over 500,000+ customer records, surfacing the behavioral drivers of churn and shipping a web app to expose churn-risk insights.

projects.title: PDF-Insight RAG Assistant
projects.subtitle: LangChain + FAISS Q&A
projects.desc: A retrieval-augmented Q&A app: PDFs are vectorized with OpenAI embeddings and stored in FAISS, and Gemini-Pro generates context-aware answers, orchestrated end-to-end with LangChain.

publications.title: Data Quality & Anomaly Detection Pipeline
publications.desc: A data-quality workflow using profiling rules, statistical thresholds, and anomaly detection to flag missing values, duplicates, volume spikes, and abnormal time-series patterns before they reach reporting.

publications.title: BigQuery ML Customer Analytics
publications.desc: A GCP analytics pipeline profiling customer behavior and trends with BigQuery ML and Vertex AI, orchestrated with Airflow and PySpark.

publications.title: Citi Bike Demand Forecasting
publications.desc: An end-to-end ML pipeline forecasting hourly Citi Bike demand with LightGBM over 1M+ trips — 20+ MLflow experiments and a 12 to 15% MAE improvement.

publications.title: Three CS Degrees
publications.desc: Diploma in CS, B.Tech in CSE, and an M.S. in CS at the University at Buffalo — a deep foundation in Java, C++, DSA, DBMS, OS, networks, and software engineering.
